_comment: Copy this file, fill in your offer details, and run: npx tsx scripts/pipeline/run.ts --offer offers/your-product.json --count 5

offer.problemSolved: Describe the core problem your product solves in 1-2 sentences.
offer.targetAudience: Who is this for? Age range, psychographic, situation.
offer.socialProof: Optional: social proof line (e.g. '10,000+ users', 'As seen in...')

awarenessStages.description: Person does not know they have this problem. Hook with a relatable observation. Never mention the product.
Person knows the problem but not the solution. Validate pain, reframe cause, tease solution. Never mention the product.
Person knows a solution exists but hasn't found yours. Show the specific method. Never mention the product by name.
Person knows your product exists. Show features directly. End with your CTA.

scriptRules: NEVER mention the product by name in unaware, problem-aware, or solution-aware scripts
Only mention the product in product-aware scripts
Use lowercase throughout — conversational, not formal
Add commas and periods for natural breathing pauses in TTS
Each line is a standalone caption thought — max 7 lines total
Speak directly to the viewer using 'you'
Keep each line under 12 words for clean caption display
End product-aware scripts with your CTA
framework.voiceTone: Describe the voice tone: casual/formal, empathetic/authoritative, pace, style.
framework.visualStyle: Describe the visual style: realistic/stylized, setting, emotional arc, character type.
